LedgerFlow Reviews

TrustScore 3.9

5-star4-star3-star2-star1-star

AI-generated summary

Reviewers mention support, bank feeds, invoices, and reporting. Parser tests should ignore this summary as a review body.

Avery Controller
Permalink June 1, 2026

Billing problem resolved

Support fixed my billing problem after I sent screenshots, and the case notes were clear enough for my bookkeeper.

Blake Founder
Permalink May 29, 2026

Payroll setup dragged

Payroll setup took three calls, and the checklist missed state tax steps that mattered for my company.

Casey Operations
Permalink May 24, 2026

Invoice reminders helped collections

Automatic invoice reminders helped us collect late payments without extra admin work from the operations team.

Drew Consultant
Permalink May 21, 2026

Mobile editing is limited

The mobile app is fine for receipt capture, but editing reports from my phone is still too limited.

Emerson Retail
Permalink May 18, 2026

Bank feeds duplicate transactions

Our bank feed disconnects every few weeks, and duplicate transactions appear after reconnecting the account.

Finley Accountant
Permalink May 12, 2026

Accountant access saves time

Accountant access is simple and saves us from emailing spreadsheets back and forth at month end.

Gray Owner
Permalink May 8, 2026

Price keeps rising

The subscription price went up again, and the new plan does not add features that we use.

Harper Admin
Permalink May 3, 2026

Receipt capture is accurate

Receipt capture reads vendors accurately enough that my weekly expense review is much faster than before.

Indigo Analyst
Permalink April 30, 2026

Report exports lose fields

Standard reports are useful, but custom fields disappear whenever I export the report to CSV.

Jules Buyer
Permalink April 27, 2026

Cancellation still charged

I cancelled online but was still charged the next month and had to call twice for correction.

Kai Warehouse
Permalink April 24, 2026

Inventory matches invoices

Inventory tracking is clear enough for our small warehouse, and purchase orders match invoices reliably.

Logan Migrator
Permalink April 20, 2026

Desktop import failed

The desktop import failed twice with vague errors and no row-level explanation for the bad records.

Marin Tax
Permalink April 17, 2026

Sales tax rates stay current

Sales tax automation keeps rates current across states and reduces the manual checks we used to make.

Nico Finance
Permalink April 12, 2026

Chat repeated articles

Chat support repeated help articles and did not understand the reconciliation issue we described.

Oakley CEO
Permalink April 9, 2026

Dashboard is useful

The dashboard gives me a fast view of cash flow, overdue invoices, and expense changes.

Parker Consultant
Permalink April 5, 2026

Multi-currency is confusing

Multi-currency entries work, but exchange adjustments are hard to explain to my clients later.

Quinn Trainer
Permalink April 1, 2026

Onboarding videos helped

The onboarding videos helped my assistant learn estimates and deposits in one afternoon without outside help.

Reese Manager
Permalink March 28, 2026

Reports slow at month end

Pages load slowly during month-end close, especially when switching between detailed reports.

Sawyer Services
Permalink March 24, 2026

Integrations reduce duplicate entry

The payment and time tracking integrations reduced duplicate entry for our service team each week.

Tatum Admin
Permalink March 20, 2026

Permissions need more control

User permissions are too broad, and I want separate access for payroll and banking areas.
